paper_title: Isotope Analysis and Water Source Identification in Poyang Lake Wetland

methods.description: Analysis of water samples using a continuous-flow isotope composition mass spectrometer to determine isotope ratios against Vienna Standard Mean Ocean Water (VSMOW).

steps.description: Water samples were analysed using a continuous-flow isotope composition mass spectrometer coupled with a TC/EA (MAT-253, Thermo-Finnigan Instrument Inc., Bremen, Germany) at Wuhan University in China.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze water samples using isotope mass spectrometer

steps.description: All the isotope data are reported with the δ notation (‰) against Vienna Standard Mean Ocean Water (VSMOW) and the results were calculated by Equation (2).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate isotope ratios using δ notation against VSMOW

steps.description: We measured more than 6 international isotopic standards for calibrating analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: calibrate isotope analysis using international standards

methods.method_name: Water Source Identification Using IsoSource Model
methods.description: Application of the IsoSource mixing model to identify water sources supporting Carex cinerascens growth by analyzing isotope compositions.

steps.description: The IsoSource mixing model was used to identify the water sources supporting Carex cinerascens growth.
steps.searchable_summary: apply IsoSource model to identify water sources

steps.description: The mean and standard deviation of isotope compositions and the isotope discrimination value (in this case, zero) from potential sources were provided to calculate in the IsoSource model.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate using mean and standard deviation in IsoSource model

methods.description: Collection and processing of soil, plant, and water samples from Poyang Lake wetland for isotope analysis.

steps.description: We sampled soils, Carex cinerascens and groundwater from six different sites within an area of 150 m.
steps.searchable_summary: collect soil, plant, and groundwater samples

steps.description: The soil was extracted through a soil collector, then we divided the soil columns into single stratum of several centimeters each, and then we extracted the soil water through a cryogenic vacuum distillation extraction system.
steps.searchable_summary: extract soil water using cryogenic vacuum distillation

steps.description: Groundwater was taken directly from the well.
Carex cinerascens stem water was also extracted through the cryogenic vacuum distillation extraction system until no new droplets were condensed within 2 hours.
steps.searchable_summary: extract stem water using cryogenic vacuum distillation

steps.description: Rainwater was collected using plastic buckets, which were cleaned 5 times after each use, and rinsed 3 times before sampling, near the sampling sites in the village.
steps.searchable_summary: collect rainwater using cleaned plastic buckets

steps.description: All samples were transported to the laboratory. Before analyses, rainwater and groundwater samples were filtered through 0.22 µm aperture filters and were placed into 1.5 mL autosampler vials.
steps.searchable_summary: filter and prepare samples for analysis
